items.title: Emergency declared on Canary Islands with 'the worst storm to hit in more than a decade' brings severe weather and even snow
items.deck: The storm has been described as the worst to hit the Canary Islands in more than a decade, with the popular Brit destination under an orange weather alert after days of wild conditions.

items.title: FBI Misled Court To Spy on Second Trump Adviser
items.deck: Carter Page wasn't the only adviser from Trump's first campaign wiretapped by the FBI.

items.title: "Lot Of Questions On Structure:" Goldman Reacts To Old Bay Maker's Bid For Unilever Food Unit
items.deck: "Lot Of Questions On Structure:" Goldman Reacts To Old Bay Maker's Bid For Unilever Food Unit Bloomberg reported earlier this week that Unilever Plc was in early talks to sell its food business - a move that would end its competition with major packaged-food rivals, including Nestlé, PepsiCo, and Kraft Heinz.

items.title: In Photos: The War in Ukraine, After 4 Years
items.deck: A photographic chronicle of Russia’s invasion.

items.title: Norway's crown princess speaks out on ties to Jeffrey Epstein
items.deck: Mette-Marit, who is married to Crown Prince Haakon, sat down with Norwegian broadcaster NRK for a 20-minute interview on Thursday.

items.title: Viral Facebook Privacy Warnings Are Like Climate Zombie Theories
items.deck: A well-known privacy warning hoax lives on within social media platforms.

items.title: Bottles of Children’s Ibuprofen Recalled Due to ‘Foreign Substance'
items.deck: The FDA has announced that nearly 90,000 bottles of children’s ibuprofen have been recalled due to the possible presence of a foreign substance.

items.title: Couple are ordered to tear down 6ft garden fence outside their £1.15m home after council officials rule it 'ugly' and 'out of character' in upmarket neighbourhood
items.deck: Paul and Lisa Toomer, who live in an affluent suburb of Poole, Dorset, erected the large looming wooden fence due to concerns about their security and privacy.

items.title: Attacks on Middle East Oil Fields Send Gas Prices Soaring
items.deck: Iran’s oil fields are continuing to burn after an Israeli attack that triggered Iran to retaliate against oil facilities.
